title: Method Level 2C — Combination
summary: Both hands together in D position, G position, and A minor — the first grand-staff reading in new hand positions.

exercises.title: D Position Review
exercises.summary: Six-measure right-hand review of D position combining steps and skips.
exercises.goal: Play D position fluently at a confident tempo before introducing both hands.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Position Review
exercises.summary: Six-measure right-hand review of G position before playing both hands.
exercises.goal: Play G position confidently from G4 up to D5 and back.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Review
exercises.summary: Six-measure right-hand review of A natural minor position.
exercises.goal: Play A minor position with a flowing, expressive minor-mode character.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Bass Review
exercises.summary: Six-measure left-hand review of D position in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Play D position bass line with accurate F-sharp and clear phrasing.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Bass Review
exercises.summary: Six-measure left-hand review of G position in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Play bass G position fluently from G2 up to D3 and back.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Bass Review
exercises.summary: Six-measure left-hand review of A minor position in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Play bass A minor position expressively before introducing both hands.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Hands Together
exercises.summary: First grand-staff exercise in D position — both hands in parallel motion.
exercises.goal: Coordinate both hands in D position simultaneously for the first time.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Hands Together
exercises.summary: Both hands in parallel motion through G position.
exercises.goal: Coordinate both hands across two octaves in G position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Hands Together
exercises.summary: Both hands in parallel motion through A minor position.
exercises.goal: Play A minor together in both hands — feel the minor mode in both registers.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Melody Over Bass
exercises.summary: Right hand plays the D melody while left hand holds sustained bass notes.
exercises.goal: Keep left-hand half notes steady while right hand moves independently.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Melody Over Bass
exercises.summary: Right hand plays the G melody while left hand holds bass half notes.
exercises.goal: Balance a flowing G-position melody over a sustained bass line.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Waltz Together
exercises.summary: Both hands dance in 3/4 waltz time in D position.
exercises.goal: Coordinate both hands in D position with a waltz character.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Waltz Together
exercises.summary: Both hands in G position waltz style.
exercises.goal: Lock both hands onto a shared three-beat waltz pulse in G position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D March Together
exercises.summary: Both hands march together in D position in 2/4.
exercises.goal: Keep both hands locked onto a unified march pulse in D position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G March Together
exercises.summary: Both hands march together in G position in 2/4.
exercises.goal: Coordinate two-beat G-position figures in both hands simultaneously.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Duet
exercises.summary: Right hand carries a minor melody while left hand provides bass half notes.
exercises.goal: Balance a minor-mode melody over a supportive bass line.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Two Voices
exercises.summary: Right hand sings a D melody while left hand moves independently.
exercises.goal: Maintain independent rhythmic lines in each hand in D position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Two Voices
exercises.summary: Independent melodic lines in both hands in G position.
exercises.goal: Sustain two distinct voices in G position with clear tone in each hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Song Extended
exercises.summary: Eight-measure A minor right-hand piece with full phrase shape.
exercises.goal: Play a complete, expressive A minor melody across eight measures.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Combination Capstone
exercises.summary: Six-measure grand-staff D-position capstone drawing on all Level 2C skills.
exercises.goal: Perform a complete two-hand D-position piece with confident F-sharp and musical phrasing.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
